title: Enhanced Breeding
description: Breeding has a configurable chance to result in multiple children
body:
Introducing the "EnhancedBreeding" plugin! Tired of the mundane breeding process in Minecraft? Look no further! This plugin spices things up by adding an exciting twist to mob breeding. Now, mobs have the opportunity to produce twins and even triplets when bred, all thanks to a customizable chance setting. Say goodbye to boring breeding and embrace the thrill of multiple offspring with the "EnhancedBreeding" plugin.

commands:
- /enhancedbreeding reload
- /enhancedbreeding set-chance-twins [0-100]
- /enhancedbreeding set-chance-triplets [0-100]

permissions:
- enhancedbreeding.reload
- enhancedbreeding.set-chance.triplets
- enhancedbreeding.set-chance.twins
- enhancedbreeding.set-chance.*
- enhancedbreeding.*
